Title: I'm Just Here for the Pi — Funny Math Teacher Shirt
Body (HTML): For the math teacher who chose this life for one reason: the π. (And also summers, let's be honest.) Title: I Bleed Red Ink — Funny English Teacher Shirt
Body (HTML): Every English teacher has a red pen and they are not afraid to use it. Comma splices, dangling modifiers, "your" vs "you're" — they see it all and they correct every last one. This shirt is for the ELA teacher who bleeds for the language. And for their students' papers. Mostly their students' papers.

Title: Sorry I Can't I Have Art Things — Funny Art Teacher Shirt
Body (HTML): Art teachers are unavailable. They have art things. Specifically: acrylic paint on their hands that won't come off, a glue gun they haven't put down since 2019, and twelve half-finished murals. This shirt is for the art teacher who gives 100% to their students and 0% to plans that don't involve a paint brush.

Title: I Teach Special Education My Patience is a Superpower — SPED Teacher Shirt

Title: SHHH Actually No Come Ask Me Things — Funny School Librarian Shirt
Body (HTML): The "Shhh" reputation is overblown. Librarians are actually the most useful person in the building — they know where everything is, they can find any book ever written, and they've been quietly running the best room in school for years. This shirt flips the script. Come ask the librarian things. They've been waiting.

Title: I Teach PE I Run on Coffee and Chaos — Funny PE Teacher Shirt
Body (HTML): P.E. teachers get kids to do things most adults can't: run laps without complaining (okay, with minimal complaining), learn teamwork, and put down their phones for 45 minutes. It takes coffee. It takes chaos. It takes a very specific kind of person who thought "you know what sounds fun? Refereeing 30 twelve-year-olds playing dodgeball." This shirt is for them.
